infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dayframe uses precise location to distinguish nearby saved places and show reviewable visit evidence.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dayframe records visits and significant location changes in the background so journeys become private, reviewable activity suggestions before they become time entries.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Dayframe reads sleep and workout summaries from Apple Health so they become reviewable activity events.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Dayframe does not write health data, but iOS requires this description when health data access is enabled.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Dayframe reads sleep and workout summaries from Apple Health so they become reviewable activity events.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Dayframe does not write health data, but iOS requires this description when health data access is enabled.
